name: Eastern Star Real Estate Public Company Limited
summary: Eastern Star Real Estate Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property development business in Thailand. It operates in three segments: Real Estate Business, Golf Course Business, and Rental Business. The company develops and sells land, houses, and residential condominium units; and rents properties. It also operates golf courses, as well as offers sport memberships. The company is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
